text.title: Error-Tracker to Draft-PR Pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent opened PR and approved itself; bad patch merged.
antipattern.fix: Token scope: agent can only open draft; ready-for-review requires human.

antipattern.symptom: Patch shipped; exception returned next week.
antipattern.fix: Mandate test; PR template enforces presence.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline opens 20 PRs/day for flaky tests.
antipattern.root-cause: Threshold too low; intermittent cluster not filtered.
antipattern.fix: Tune thresholds; add flakiness-detector that suppresses intermittent clusters.
